common.footerDesc: Lowlands Coffee brings you the rich flavor of traditional Vietnamese phin coffee from the Central Highlands, connecting people through every aromatic cup.

home.heroSubtitle: Original flavors from the lowlands - Connecting modern Vietnamese phin coffee culture.
home.featuredDesc: Carefully selected drinks, bringing the signature taste of Lowlands.
home.promoDesc: Grab attractive offers today from Lowlands Coffee.
home.locatorDesc: With our growing network, find a cozy Lowlands Coffee spot near you.
home.aboutDesc: Lowlands Coffee was born out of an infinite love for Vietnamese coffee beans. Unlike the high mountain peaks, 'Lowlands' represents the fertile valleys and plains where heaven and earth intersect, a gathering place for life and connection. We bring select Robusta and Arabica beans from the red soils of the Central Highlands down to the bustling cities, preserving the traditional phin brewing method while elevating it with a modern service experience in a warm, minimalist space.
